title: Ontology Map Toolkit — Cockpit Schema
description: Optional configuration file that overrides inference engine defaults. ALL fields are optional (INV-OT-013: graph.json alone produces a complete cockpit). This file declares overrides — anything omitted is inferred automatically from graph_data.json. Supports YAML (cockpit_schema.yaml) or JSON.

meta.description: Global configuration overrides for the cockpit. Each field overrides an inference engine decision.

title.description: Display title for the cockpit. If omitted, inferred from graph metadata.name or the first root node's label.

description.description: Subtitle / description shown below the title.

template.description: Override the inferred template type. The inference engine auto-detects from graph topology — use this only to force a specific template.

layout.description: Override the template's default layout algorithm.

palette.description: Named color palette or custom palette ID. If omitted, categorical palette auto-generated from node groups.

shape_pack.description: Shape pack to use for node rendering. If omitted, uses 'default' pack with inference-based shape mapping.

nodes.description: Per-node overrides. Keys are node IDs from graph_data.json. Each value overrides the inference engine's decisions for that specific node. Only specified fields are overridden — omitted fields use inference.

edges.description: Edge style overrides. Each entry matches edges from graph_data.json by 'from'+'to' and applies visual overrides.

submaps.description: Submap definitions for drill-down views. Keys are submap IDs (typically matching a node ID from the main graph). Each submap defines a detailed interior view with its own nodes and edges.

details.description: Detail card content for nodes. Keys are node IDs from graph_data.json. Displayed when a node is clicked. If omitted for a node, the detail panel shows auto-generated content from the node's properties.

scene.description: 3D scene configuration overrides. Controls bloom, camera, fog, and lighting. If omitted, uses template-specific defaults.

editor.description: Code editor configuration for fractal drill-down (F-06) Level 3-4. Controls syntax highlighting, themes, and LSP.

stats.description: Stats bar items shown at the bottom of the cockpit. Each item is a label + value pair. If omitted, auto-generated from graph metadata.

legend.description: Legend items shown in the bottom-left. Each maps a color to a semantic meaning. If omitted, auto-generated from edge types/colors.

NodeOverride.description: Override inference decisions for a specific node. Only specified fields are overridden.

sub.description: Subtitle text displayed below the label.

shape.description: Override inferred shape. Must be a valid shape name from the active shape pack. Implemented shapes (26): brain, conveyor, database, dial, dyson_book, factory, gate, gauge, gear, graph, hourglass, hub, monitor, monument, nexus, pillars, prism, rack, satellite, screens, sphere, stairs, terminal, tree, vault, warehouse. Unrecognized names render as the default shape (sphere).

hero.description: Mark as hero node (visually emphasized, slightly larger, stronger glow). Default: false.

color.description: Override node color. Accepts hex (#34d399), named (green), or oklch (oklch(70% 0.15 150)).

auto.description: Mark as auto-learning module (visual indicator). Domain-specific.

hidden.description: Hide this node from the 3D scene. Node still exists in graph data but is not rendered.

EdgeOverride.description: Visual style override for a specific edge. Matched by from+to pair.

color.description: Edge color. Named (green, blue, purple, cyan, white), hex, or oklch.

particles.description: Show animated particles along this edge.

SubmapDef.description: A submap is a detailed interior view that appears when drilling into a node. It has its own set of nodes and edges, displayed as a zoomed-in pipeline or layout.

title.description: Display title for the submap (shown in breadcrumb and header).

color.description: Category color for the submap zone/platform. Named color matching a group (e.g., 'source', 'layer', 'module') or explicit color.

layout.description: Layout algorithm for this submap. If omitted, uses 'pipeline' (horizontal flow).

nodes.description: Nodes within this submap. Each node follows the same schema as graph_data.json nodes but with explicit positions (x, z) for precise layout.

SubmapNode.description: A node within a submap. Has explicit positioning for precise pipeline/flow layouts.

x.description: X position within the submap coordinate space.

z.description: Z position within the submap coordinate space.

c.description: Color name (shorthand for 'color'). Named: green, blue, purple, cyan, white.

DetailCard.description: Content for the detail panel shown when a node is clicked. Supports Markdown in the description field.

tp.description: Type label shown as a badge (e.g., 'Cortical Layer', 'Knowledge Source', 'Reasoning Engine').

d.description: Description text. Supports basic Markdown (bold, italic, code).

m.description: Metrics displayed as key-value pairs in the detail card.

additionalProperties.description: Metric value (always string for display purposes).

SceneConfig.description: 3D scene rendering configuration. All values have sensible defaults aligned with INV-OT-028 (emissive ≤0.3, roughness ≥0.4).

ortho_frustum.description: OrthographicCamera frustum half-size. Larger = more zoomed out. Default: 14.

fog_density.description: Exponential fog density. 0 = no fog. Default: 0.

background.description: Scene background color. Hex or oklch. If omitted, uses theme background.

directional_light_intensity.description: Main directional light intensity. Range: 0.0-2.0. Default: 0.7.

node_metalness.description: Default metalness for node materials. Range: 0.0-1.0. Default: 0.3.

node_roughness.description: Default roughness for node materials. INV-OT-028: minimum 0.4. Default: 0.5.

node_emissive_max.description: Maximum emissive intensity for nodes. INV-OT-028: capped at 0.3. Default: 0.2.

EditorConfig.description: Code editor configuration for fractal drill-down (F-06) Level 3-4. Controls syntax highlighting theme, grammar, keybindings, and optional LSP.

theme.description: VSCode color theme name for syntax highlighting. Any TextMate-compatible theme works. Default: 'github-dark'.

grammar.description: TextMate grammar scope for syntax highlighting. If omitted, auto-detected from file extension. Example: 'source.python', 'source.js'.

snippets.description: Path to snippets JSON files (glob pattern). VSCode-compatible snippets.

keybindings.description: Keybinding preset for the code editor.

lsp.description: Language Server Protocol configuration. Requires a backend running the language server. Optional — Tier 2 feature.

port.description: WebSocket port for LSP connection. Default: 3000.

StatItem.description: A single item in the stats bar at the bottom of the cockpit.

value.description: Numeric value or text to display.

LegendItem.description: A single item in the edge color legend.

color.description: Color for the legend dot. Named, hex, or oklch.

edge_type.description: Edge type this legend item corresponds to. Used for filtering.
